what: Keep the strongest split-K=7 4x32 reduction geometry, drop the regressing tl.assume extent/unit-stride bundle, and let the compiler choose waves
why: v310 is the strongest benchmarked branch at 8.6238 us; v314 showed the tl.assume bundle regresses badly, so this isolates the cleanup while preserving the restored quant alignment/contiguous hints

what: Keep the split-K=7 4x32 winner but make MAX_KSPLIT exact instead of padding 7 to 8 in the reduce kernel
why: The reference reduce kernel masks tail split lanes, so the padded eighth lane is avoidable overhead; exact MAX_KSPLIT regressed on 8x32, but 4x32 has different row-tile pressure and remains untested

what: Restore the exact v310 split-K=7 4x32 waves=1 quant-hints winner as the leaderboard candidate
why: v321 regressed to 8.6955 us BM, v322 is structurally invalid, and v310 remains the best measured branch at 8.6238 us; the next rational move is leaderboard confirmation of the proven winner
override: Prior work covered nearby split-K 4x32 variants, but this proposal explicitly re-stages the best measured branch for leaderboard confirmation after eliminating the v321/v322 branches

what: Restore the v263 fused-path hint branch for leaderboard-oriented evaluation
why: v323 proved the aggressive 4x32 split-K retile still loses on LB; v263 keeps the stronger v211 geometry/cache baseline and adds only fused-path max_contiguous plus row-stride multiple_of hints, which makes it the cleanest remaining LB-focused candidate
override: This revisits an older benchmarked branch because recent leaderboard evidence says the later split-K retile family is not transferring to LB

what: Restore the unscored v292 split-K=7 8x32 confirmation branch as the next leaderboard fallback
why: v324 is queued behind leaderboard quota, while v292 never received a real leaderboard outcome because artifact download failed; it remains the cleanest untried LB fallback in the nearby high-BM family
override: This revisits a previously submitted branch because the prior leaderboard attempt failed infrastructurally and yielded no performance signal
